name: spi_master
core_function: SPI master that shifts words over MOSI/MISO with configurable clock polarity, phase, divider, and chip select.
algorithm: Use a divider counter to generate SCLK edge enables from clk. Keep TX and RX shift
structure: Use a divider counter to derive SCLK enable strobes rather than a generated clock when possible.
Separate launch and sample edges to support CPHA modes.
Shift TX and RX registers in opposite directions according to bit order.
Keep chip select asserted across the whole word and optionally across bursts.
